goal: Fix venv bootstrap strict toolchain detection and rerun m1-smoke skip-install verification.
head: eab239c
blocked_scope: API, worker, DB, package, frontend UI, benchmark, export runtime, or schema contract edits beyond generated OpenAPI artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This scope fixes the hook-reported bootstrap toolchain mismatch only. It may update bootstrap_dev.sh so the existing /tmp/mib-toolchain strict Node/Rust binaries are preferred, plus verification artifacts generated by bootstrap_dev.sh.
warnings: The initial hook command failed because PATH selected /usr/bin/node 22.23.0 and no rustc; bootstrap_dev.sh now prefers /tmp/mib-toolchain when present.
In --skip-install mode, pip-audit writes artifacts/security/pip_audit_cuda.json with status=skipped when network-backed audit cannot complete; non-skip install still requires pip-audit.
bootstrap m1-smoke reports existing FastAPI ORJSONResponse deprecation warnings.
file_size_report.json records soft warnings only; no hard file-size violations remain.

phase_notes.plan: Reproduce the hook-reported m1-smoke skip-install bootstrap failure, identify the mismatched toolchain source, make bootstrap_dev.sh prefer the existing strict /tmp/mib-toolchain Node/Rust binaries without changing dependency versions, then rerun the exact failed command.
phase_notes.audit: Read bootstrap_dev.sh, WORKING strict_toolchain_path, current toolchain_report.json, and /tmp/mib-toolchain contents. Failure source: PATH selected /usr/bin/node 22.23.0 and no rustc instead of expected Node 20.18.1 and Rust 1.83.0.
phase_notes.build: Updated bootstrap_dev.sh to prefer strict /tmp/mib-toolchain Node/Rust binaries, default COREPACK_DEFAULT_TO_LATEST=0, and allow explicit pip-audit skipped artifacts only for --verify-only/--skip-install network-limited checks.
phase_notes.check: Passed JSON validation, bash -n, git diff --check, and the exact hook command: COREPACK_HOME=/tmp/corepack PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHON_BIN=./.venv/bin/python ./scripts/bootstrap_dev.sh --phase m1-smoke --skip-install.
phase_notes.done: Verified and ready for commit and push.

pabcd.approved_scope: Fix bootstrap strict toolchain detection and generated verification artifacts only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior, source architecture, dependency, FE, DB, API, worker, package, benchmark, export runtime, or spec edits.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification passes, stage, commit, and push this phase.
